meaning: n.兜在马尾下的皮带,马屁股,臀部
examples: Waterloo bears divine right on its crupper.
Crupper: a leather strap looped under a horse's tail and attached to a harness or saddle to keep it from slipping forward.
Now when he met him the man who then seemed already extremely weary had requested him to take him on his crupper to which the fishmonger had made no reply except by redoubling his gait.
